name: kaseya-quote-manager-mcp
description: MCP server for Kaseya Quote Manager (Datto Commerce) - read-only access to quotes, sales orders, purchasing, product catalog, and customers through AI assistants
long_description: Provides AI assistants with structured, read-only access to your Kaseya Quote Manager (Datto Commerce) data. Browse quotes and quote lines, sales orders and payments, purchase orders and costs, suppliers, the product catalog, and customer records through the Model Context Protocol. Features decision-tree navigation, client-side rate limiting, and comprehensive error handling.

kqm_api_key.title: Kaseya Quote Manager API Key
kqm_api_key.description: Your Kaseya Quote Manager API key (Settings → API). Sent in the apiKey header.
